title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE ALANGALANG AGRO-INDUSTRIAL SCHOOL IN ALANGALANG, LEYTE, TO LEYTE STATE SCHOOL OF AGRICULTURE

chunks.text:
H. No. 29235 / 87 OG No. 43, 6399 (Oct. 28, 1991)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7093, August 02, 1991 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE ALANGALANG AGRO-INDUSTRIAL SCHOOL IN ALANGALANG, LEYTE, TO LEYTE STATE SCHOOL OF AGRICULTURE

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Alangalang Agro-Industrial School in Alangalang, Leyte, is hereby changed to Leyte State School of Agriculture.

SEC. 2. The College shall offer secondary course in agriculture, short-term technical or vocational courses, and higher technological and professional instruction and training in agricultural and industrial fields as may be authorized by the Department of Education, Culture and Sports.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

JOVITO R. SALONGA

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 22, 1991 and May 16, 1991, respectively.

EDWIN P. ACOBA

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: August 2, 1991

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
